tests.name: closeout summarizes delivered docs
tests.expected: Closeout lists the pitch docs, truth gates, evidence packet assets, reviewer specs, and handoff delivered by the automation.

tests.name: closeout preserves no-runtime boundary
tests.expected: Closeout states no UI, runtime, protected paths, daemon, npm, tsx, node src/*, demo scripts, or merge actions were performed.

tests.name: closeout keeps false gates false
tests.expected: Closeout states timing and overall remain false until real rehearsals and evidence exist.

tests.name: closeout stops scheduled additions
tests.expected: Closeout says no more automated SPEC_ONLY additions should be made after 09:00 PT from this schedule.

tests.name: closeout points to final handoff files
tests.expected: Closeout points to final morning brief, start here, integration owner checklist, evidence packet template, and presenter command card.
